Name: SQL Server __DeployLog: Update
Description:
To be used with:
SQL Server __DeployLog: Read

Requires sqlserver PowerShell module on target machine.

For more information: https://octopus.com/blog/100x-faster-db-deploys

Parameters.Name: DLM_PackageStep
Parameters.Label: Database package deployment step (Required)
Parameters.HelpText: The step that deploys the package containing the database source code to the target machine.

Parameters.Name: DLM_DeployStep
Parameters.Label: Database update step (Required)
Parameters.HelpText: The step that updates the target database.

Parameters.Name: DLM_ServerInstance
Parameters.Label: Target SQL Server Instance (Required)
Parameters.HelpText:
The name of the target SQL Server instance.
e.g. SQLSERVER01\myInstance

Parameters.Name: DLM_Database
Parameters.Label: Target SQL Server Database (Required)
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the target database.

Parameters.Name: DLM_Username
Parameters.Label: SQL Auth User (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Auth user used to authenticate against the target database. (For Windows Auth, leave blank.)

Parameters.Name: DLM_Password
Parameters.Label: SQL Auth Password (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Auth password used to authenticate against the target database. (For Windows Auth, leave blank.)
